title: Phase 1: Config module tests
description: Write unit tests for the config module covering: loading from YAML, fallback to defaults, frozen dataclass immutability, backend() KeyError, allowed_tools_for() deduplication and merging logic, round-trip equivalence between default_config() and the shipped config.yaml.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover load_config() with existing YAML file
Tests cover load_config() fallback when no file exists
Tests verify frozen dataclass immutability (assignment raises FrozenInstanceError)
Tests verify backend() raises KeyError with valid options for unknown backend
Tests verify allowed_tools_for() returns deduplicated union for claude/developer
Tests verify allowed_tools_for() returns only defaults for claude/planner
Tests verify allowed_tools_for() returns empty list for codex backends
All tests pass with uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
